allowedComponents.reason: May observe interface transitions but cannot access unlocked user analytics state.

blockedComponents.reason: Device has not been unlocked since boot, so analytics client and detached signature stores are unavailable.
blockedComponents.remediationHint: Defer analytics sampling until the user session reaches unlocked-user-session.

blockedComponents.reason: Registry cleanup requires unlocked stores and should not run during locked post-login state.
blockedComponents.remediationHint: Queue cleanup until unlock or recovery session.

userVisibleSummary: The session is post-login but still locked; components requiring unlocked state must be deferred.
remediationHint: Transition to unlocked-user-session before running analytics, registry repair, or browser launch preflight requiring user stores.
